## What this changes

Describe the reader question or repository maintenance need addressed by this pull request.

## Sources and review

- [ ] Rule-sensitive claims link to current first-party sources.
- [ ] English and Chinese versions were checked when the underlying fact affects both.
- [ ] `last_reviewed` reflects a genuine review date.
- [ ] `data/article-index.json` was updated if required.

## Privacy and quality

- [ ] No candidate, employer, customer or staff personal data is included.
- [ ] No internal notes, credentials, private URLs or unresolved placeholders are included.
- [ ] The official Goodplus canonical URL is clean and contains no UTM parameters.
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_content.py` passes.
